mapper.sql: id, code, name, person_type, is_valid, sex, birthday, id_num, title, phone, email, edu_degree, hospital_id, monograph_num, paper_num, patent_num, inv_tech_std_num, train_num, hold_train_num, in_training_num, dept, job_type, is_teacher, is_expert, is_ethical_expert, profess, direction, parttime_pos, start_date, end_date, division, class_code, discipline_one, discipline_two, discipline_three, name_en, account, account_state, is_stat, edu_level, nationlity, nation, polity, duty, duty_date, work_date, person_state, tutor_type, employ_date, operate_time, creator_name, creator_code, create_time, advisor_name, advisor_code, advisor_unit, qq, bank_name, bank_account, graduate_school, experience_abroad, introduction, honor_title, occupation_category, learning, parttime, learn_specialty, check_status, is_deleted, is_refer_secret, alias, foreign_language1, foreign_language1_degree, foreign_language2, foreign_language2_degree, postcode, portraiture, mobile, teacher_type, note, job_level, hr_dept_code, hr_user_code
mapper.select:
SELECT name FROM ct_srm_user WHERE id IN
#{userId}
select id from ct_srm_user where account=#{account} limit 1

select su.id as rowId,su.code as code,su.name as name,su.sex as sex, su.sex as "sexComb.id", case when su.sex=0 then '女' when su.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as "sexComb.name", case when su.sex=0 then '女' when su.sex=1 then '男' else '' END as sexName, pt.code as "personType.id",pt.name as "personType.name",pt.name as personTypeName, csoc.code as "occupationCategory.id",csoc.name as "occupationCategory.name",csoc.name as occupationCategoryName, stt.code as "title.id",stt.name as "title.name",stt.name as titleName, csel.code as "eduLevel.id",csel.name as "eduLevel.name",csel.name as eduLevelName, su.duty_date as dutyDate, sdept.id as "dept.id",sdept.name as "dept.name",sdept.name as deptName, sed.code as "eduDegree.id",sed.name as "eduDegree.name",sed.name as eduDegreeName, su.account as account,su.is_expert as isExpert,su.is_ethical_expert as isEthicalExpert, su.direction as direction,su.is_stat as isStat,su.is_valid as isValid,su.introduction as introduction, su.id_num as idNum,su.birthday as birthday,su.email as email, csjl.code as "jobLevel.id",csjl.name as "jobLevel.name",csjl.name as jobLevelName, csjt.code as "jobType.id",csjt.name as "jobType.name",csjt.name as jobTypeName, fdiscipline.code as "disciplineOne.id",fdiscipline.name as "disciplineOne.name", sdiscipline.code as "disciplineTwo.id",sdiscipline.name as "disciplineTwo.name", tdiscipline.code as "disciplineThree.id",tdiscipline.name as "disciplineThree.name", cspj.code as "parttimePos.id",cspj.name as "parttimePos.name", su.graduate_school as graduateSchool,su.start_date as startDate,su.end_date as endDate, su.profess as profess,csty.code as "teacherType.id",csty.name as "teacherType.name", su.employ_date as employDate,su.duty as duty, csnc.code as "nationlity.id",csnc.name as "nationlity.name", csnm.code as "nation.id",csnm.name as "nation.name", su.postcode as postcode,su.portraiture as portraiture,su.mobile as mobile, su.learning as learning,su.experience_abroad as experienceAbroad,csdu.is_director as isDirector, case when pt.is_external=1 then 'ExternalUser' when pt.is_graduate=1 then 'GradUser' else 'User' END as personTypeAlias ,su.phone ,su.polity ,su.person_state as personState ,su.class_code as classCode ,su.honor_title as honorTitle ,su.division ,su.is_teacher as isTeacher ,su.create_time ,hua.code as creator_code,hua.name as creator_name, su.update_time as auditDate, (select name from ct_srm_user WHERE id=su.update_user) as auditUserName, case when su.check_status=1 then '通过' when su.check_status=2 then '不通过' else '' end as checkStatus from ct_srm_user su left join ct_srm_person_type pt on su.person_type=pt.code left join ct_srm_title_info stt on su.title=stt.code left join ct_srm_edu_degree sed on su.edu_degree=sed.code left join ct_srm_dept_user sdu on su.id=sdu.user left join ct_srm_occupation_category csoc on csoc.code=su.occupation_category left join ct_srm_edu_level csel on csel.code=su.edu_level left join ct_srm_job_type csjt on csjt.code=su.job_type left join ct_srm_job_level csjl on csjl.code=su.job_level left join ct_srm_parttime_job cspj on cspj.code=su.parttime_pos left join ct_srm_teacher_type csty on csty.code=su.teacher_type left join ct_srm_polity csp on csp.code=su.polity left join ct_srm_nationality csnc on csnc.code=su.nationlity left join ct_srm_nation csnm on csnm.code=su.nation left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=su.class_code left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=su.discipline_one left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=su.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=su.discipline_three left join ct_srm_dept sdept on sdept.id=su.dept left join ct_srm_dept_user csdu on csdu.dept=su.dept and csdu.user=su.id left join hos_user_account hua on su.creator_code=hua.code where su.id=#{RowId}
mapper.update:
update ct_srm_user
is_valid = #{isValid},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select: select id from ct_srm_expert_group_relation where user_id =#{userId} and group_id=#{expertGrpId}

select csegr.group_id as expertGroupId,cseg.name as expertGroupName from ct_srm_expert_group_relation csegr left join ct_srm_expert_group cseg on csegr.group_id =cseg.code where csegr.user_id = #{userCode}

select cseg.id as expertGroupId,cseg.name as expertGroupName from ct_srm_expert_group cseg where cseg.code not in (select csegr.group_id from ct_srm_expert_group_relation csegr where csegr.user_id = #{userCode} )
select id from ct_srm_expert_group_relation where group_id= #{expertGroup} and user_id=#{userCode}
mapper.update: update ct_srm_user set check_status =#{status},is_valid=1 where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select: SELECT id , name,code FROM ct_srm_user where is_valid=1 and tutor_type is not null
